title: ESP32CAM-based Smart Garage Number Plate Recognition System
description: Developed an automated garage gate system utilizing an ESP32-CAM to capture vehicle license plates. Integrated with an Optical Character Recognition (OCR) system or image processing algorithm to identify registered plates, automatically triggering a servo motor or relay to open the garage door for authorized vehicles while enhancing residential security.

title: Raspberry Pi-based Trainerkit Embedded System
description: Designed and developed an integrated embedded system trainer kit based on Raspberry Pi for educational and prototyping purposes. The kit serves as a comprehensive learning platform featuring various sensor interfaces, actuators, and communication modules, allowing students and developers to simulate real-world automation and robotics control workflows efficiently.

title: Smart Lighting System for Energy Efficiency
description: Developed an IoT-based Smart Lighting System designed to optimize power consumption in residential or commercial buildings. Integrated motion sensors (PIR) and ambient light sensors (LDR) with a microcontroller to automatically adjust brightness or toggle lights based on human presence and natural daylight levels, achieving significant energy savings.
